principle: Gerfex is the system. The brain is replaceable.
provider_rules: A brain provider may be stopped without stopping Gerfex.
A brain provider may be replaced without changing Gerfex identity.
A brain provider may suggest actions but may not execute actions directly.
A brain provider may discuss learning only through the learning system.
Permanent learning approval requires explicit Mashel approval.
If the active brain fails, Gerfex must fall back to a safe dummy provider.
